name: two_tandoor_orders_informalabbreviated_client_refe
description: Two tandoor orders, informal/abbreviated client references
expected_output: Two separate tandoor orders: Tezpur unit (2 units) and Ranchi unit (1 unit). Different clients, same item.
pass_criteria: PASS: Two separate orders attributed to two different clients. FAIL: Merged into one tandoor order or wrong client attribution.
challenge: Clients referred to informally by location ('Tezpur walo', 'Ranchi unit') rather than formal unit names. Agent must recognise as different clients.
notes: Tests informal location-based client references in order separation
